summary: Latency-sensitive first-finish smoke test for Kukus.In finance app. Verified backend CRUD for ingredients, packaging, menus (HPP/recommended price formula), sales (stock deduction + restore on delete), invoices, settings, and dashboard. Verified frontend: all 7 sidebar nav testids exist, ingredient add-via-dialog flow works end-to-end, key action buttons (add-menu-btn, add-sale-btn) present, settings page renders Kukus.In branding.
passed: POST/GET /api/ingredients works; ingredient created with name/unit/price/stock/threshold
POST /api/menus returns computed: ingredients_cost=3000, packaging_cost=500, hpp=5000, recommended_price=16000 (= ceil(5000/(0.4*0.8))=15625 rounded up to 16000) - formula verified
POST /api/sales with shopeefood channel: stock decreased 1000->600 ingredient, 100->98 packaging; platform_fee=6400 (20% of 32000 subtotal); profit=15600
DELETE /api/sales restores ingredient stock back to 1000
POST /api/invoices generates invoice_number INV-202606-0001, subtotal=32000, tax_amount=3200, total=35200
GET /api/dashboard/stats?period=30d returns full structure with trend array (30 entries)
Frontend loads at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL; Dashboard renders revenue/profit/margin cards + trend chart + best sellers
All 7 sidebar nav data-testids present (nav-dashboard, nav-ingredients, nav-packaging, nav-menus, nav-sales, nav-invoices, nav-settings)
Add Ingredient dialog flow works: add-ingredient-btn -> ingredient-name-input -> ingredient-save-btn; row appears in table

failed.issue: Endpoint requires 'name' field even though it is a preview-only (not saved). Frontend must include a placeholder name when calling preview.
POST /api/sales requires 'date' field; not auto-defaulted to today
failed.evidence: POST without date returns 422 'date required'. Works fine when date is provided.

failed.issue: Invoice items expect field 'name' (not 'description' as commonly assumed). Documented for frontend consistency.
failed.evidence: POST with item.description returns 422: 'items.0.name' field required. Works with 'name'.

action_items: Ensure frontend Menus page sends a 'name' value (or placeholder) when calling /api/menus/preview-hpp for live HPP calc
Ensure frontend Sales form always sends 'date' (default to today) when calling POST /api/sales
Ensure frontend Invoice form sends item.name (not description) when calling POST /api/invoices
Consider making date default to today server-side on /api/sales for resilience (optional polish)

success_rate.backend: 100% on core flows (all CRUD, HPP formula, stock deduction/restore, invoice numbering verified)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested smoke flow (nav + ingredient add + page loads)

notes: Deferred to full QA: end-to-end menu creation with live HPP recompute, sale via UI with multi-item & stock verification on UI, invoice print page (/invoice/{id}/print), settings update persistence, low-stock alert UI, mobile sidebar toggle.
